entry.title: New: BILL046(25) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE HONOLULU POLICE DEPARTMENT.

Requires the Chief of Police to develop and implement a strategic plan and internal procedures for the release of certain information to the media and public and provide local media outlets with access to HPD dispatch radio communications. Requires the Chief of Police to submit updates to the Council.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
